summary: The diff implements a large portion of the REQ-1 rebuild, including backend data models (clients, interventions, user profiles, media/blob storage, technical folder, blacklist, RBAC), and frontend pages/components for clients, interventions, technical folder, dashboard routing, authentication, offline sync (ConnectivityStatusBar), and export dialog access. However, several acceptance criteria cannot be confirmed from the available diff due to truncation and omitted files, most notably: offline sync outbox/engine implementation, PWA manifest/service worker, and data export (JSON/PDF) dialog functionality.

missing_requirements.requirement: Offline sync (outbox, sync engine, connectivity status bar) functions correctly.
missing_requirements.reason: ConnectivityStatusBar component is present and references useSync hook, but the actual outbox and sync engine implementation files are not shown in the diff (19 modified files omitted). Cannot confirm the full offline sync pipeline is implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: PWA manifest and service worker are present and the app is installable.
missing_requirements.reason: No PWA manifest or service worker files appear in the diff. These files (manifest.json, sw.js or similar) are not shown as added or modified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Data export (JSON/PDF) dialog is accessible and functional.
missing_requirements.reason: The layout references ExportDataDialog and a Download button is wired to open it, but the ExportDataDialog component implementation file is not present in the diff (it may be among the 19 omitted files). Functionality cannot be confirmed.
